# New Feature: Story First

I want to add: `<feature description>`.

Do not implement code yet.

First steps:

- Create a new story in `docs/stories/` using the template.
- Update `docs/stories/INDEX.md` with the next sequential ID.
- Keep the story small, reviewable, and testable.
- Write clear acceptance criteria.

Then:

- Stop and ask for my review/approval of the story text.
- Only after approval, start implementation.
